mapper.sql: knowledgeBaseId, knowledgeBaseName, description, userId, embeddingConfigId, state, createTime, updateTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_knowledge_base WHERE state = '1' AND userId = #{userId} AND knowledgeBaseName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{knowledgeBaseName}, '%') ORDER BY createTime DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_knowledge_base (knowledgeBaseName, description, userId, embeddingConfigId, state) VALUES (#{knowledgeBaseName}, #{description}, #{userId}, #{embeddingConfigId}, #{state})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_knowledge_base SET state = '0' WHERE knowledgeBaseId = #{knowledgeBaseId}
